About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Government is the state government of Uttar Pradesh, India. It is responsible for the administration of the state and provides various services to its citizens.
The government has launched various initiatives to improve the education sector in the state, including the recruitment of ECCE Educators.

About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme is an initiative by the Uttar Pradesh government to recruit qualified candidates for the post of ECCE Educators. The programme aims to provide quality education to children in the state and to improve the overall education sector.
The programme is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selected candidates will be appointed as ECCE Educators in the state.
